description: CompositionMesh breathable upper with light weight phylon mid soleWash CareClean with a soft, damp cloth. Brush surface to remove dust. No machine washFittingComfort FitThese adidas sports shoes equip your feet with a unique weapon called comfort. These sports shoes have an adaptive fit to allow your feet's natural motion patterns. These running shoes can be used by intermediate level sportsmen and women for all Sports activities except football on hard ground courts.
